title: Human Feedback UX Trust Hardening Gate
title_ko: 사용자 피드백 UX 신뢰성 보강 게이트
description: Before Phase 4 Tags & Search, harden direct-user trust gaps in Dashboard capture, Inbox triage, Project context, Kanban clarity, and navigation roles.
scope_guardrails: Do not remove top-level Tasks in this gate.
Do not remove top-level Kanban in this gate.
Do not convert Meeting Notes to Form-first input in this gate.
Do not redesign the Project data model or Project Detail IA wholesale.
Do not implement full Decisions or full Search.
Do not add external integrations, AI automation, multi-user/auth, or cloud sync.

tasks.title: Create Phase 3.7 plan artifact and block Phase 4
progress_notes: Created plan/phase_3_7.json and added Phase 3.7 to plan/phase_4.json dependencies before feature work.

tasks.title: Dashboard capture and Inbox edit/archive/restore
progress_notes: Dashboard Quick Inbox now supports source type and project selection.
Dashboard Inbox rows support inline edit for content/source/project and archive with restore path.
Dashboard now exposes a visible capture-triage-execute guide and a dedicated Quick Inbox capture center so the changed workflow is recognizable on page load.

tasks.title: Inbox history simplification
progress_notes: Inbox page remains focused on Unprocessed, Converted, and Archived filters with role copy.
Inbox History now presents itself as a history/archive surface and links users back to Dashboard for fast capture and immediate triage.

tasks.title: Project creation, entry, status, and links
progress_notes: Project creation is grouped, cards have broad detail entry, status filters cover All/Active/On Hold/Done/Archived, detail status can be changed, and links explain their context purpose.
Projects now show a visible context-hub summary and status meaning cards before the project list.

tasks.title: Kanban scope and transition clarity
progress_notes: Dashboard Kanban uses an All/Project segmented control.
Hold -> Done is allowed and covered by task-status tests and browser QA API verification.

tasks.title: Product decisions and navigation role notes
progress_notes: Recorded bounded product decisions in docs/product/phase-3-7-product-decisions.md and added Tasks/Inbox role copy.

tasks.title: Verify existing audit trail
progress_notes: Verified AuditLog records exist for InboxItem, Project, and Task mutations after QA cleanup; counts observed: InboxItem 3, Project 5, Task 25.

tasks.title: Feedback document link hygiene
progress_notes: Removed stale image.png reference from docs/reviews/user-feedback/2026-06-11-human-feedback.md.

tasks.title: Validation and browser QA
progress_notes: npm.cmd run build passed.
npm.cmd run lint passed.
npm.cmd run test passed.
Headless Chromium Playwright QA passed for dashboard create/edit/archive/restore, inbox filters, project status/link help, dashboard kanban scope, Hold -> Done, and non-goal routes.

tasks.title: Repair visible UX alignment gaps from user re-check
progress_notes: Reopened Phase 3.7 because browser-visible changes were not sufficient for the user's original complaints.
Acceptance now requires project detail, standalone Kanban, Decisions, and Search pages to avoid empty/unclear role presentation, not just pass functional controls.
Implemented visible Project Overview context hub sections, standalone Kanban role explanation, and Decisions/Search not-yet-implemented role explanations.
Fresh validation passed: npm.cmd run build, npm.cmd run lint, npm.cmd run test.
Browser DOM QA passed with Playwright CLI against temporary Vite status 200. Evidence: .omx/plans/g003-browser-dom-evidence.json.

completion_criteria: Dashboard Inbox creation supports source type, project selection, default timestamp behavior, edit, archive/delete, and restore/undo.
Inbox History is simplified around Unprocessed, Converted, and Archived.
Project status visibility covers Active, On Hold, Done, and Archived in an understandable way.
Kanban transition limits are fixed or visibly explained; Hold -> Done is explicitly addressed.
Dashboard Kanban scope uses a toggle-like All vs Project interaction.
Non-goal structural changes are documented and not accidentally implemented.
Human feedback image reference is corrected.
Phase 4 remains blocked until Phase 3.7 passes.
npm.cmd run build, npm.cmd run lint, npm.cmd run test, and browser QA pass.
User re-check concerns are addressed with browser-visible role, path, and context improvements on the pages that previously felt unchanged or empty.

verification.browser_qa: Headless Chromium Playwright script passed on http://localhost:5173 with backend http://localhost:3080.

progress_notes: Phase 3.7 started from approved RALPLAN handoff.
Phase 4 dependency gate was updated before feature implementation.
Phase 3.7 was reopened after user re-check showed the prior completion criteria over-weighted functional controls and under-weighted visible UX alignment.
G003 visible UX alignment pass completed with Project detail context hub, standalone Kanban role clarity, Decisions/Search pending-phase clarity, build/lint/test, and Playwright browser DOM evidence.
